'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 45''' was the forty-fifth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[November 6]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Vote for an [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Army of the Republic]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]
*[[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]]
*[[General/Legends|General]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Maximilian Veers]]
*[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] - [[Lama Su/Legends|Lama Su's]] Office
*[[Battle droid/Legends|Military Droids]]
*[[Turbolaser/Legends|Turbolasers]]
*[[AA-9 Coruscant freighter/Legends|Coruscant Freighter]]
